MOVING PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 14, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BALFOUR BEATTY INFRASTRUCTURE INC., A CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to causes of action 4 and 5 to plead additional facts supporting the elements of an oral and implied-in-fact contract. The demurrer is overruled as to cause of action 1. Defendant's counsel is directed to read and comply with Local Rule 2.6(C) on all future pleading motions. Order signed in open court.
